description_public: A polygenic estimate related to lactose tolerance variation in the general population.

CC.notes: This genotype is associated with lower lactase enzyme activity in adulthood, meaning you may have more difficulty digesting regular dairy products without symptoms like bloating or discomfort.

CT.notes: This genotype is associated with continued lactase production into adulthood, so you are more likely to tolerate regular dairy compared to CC carriers, though individual tolerance can still vary.

TT.notes: This genotype is strongly associated with lactase persistence, meaning you are more likely to digest dairy products well into adulthood.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Lactose tolerance
evidence.quote: This genotype is associated with lower lactase enzyme activity in adulthood, meaning you may have more difficulty digesting regular dairy products without symptoms like bloating or discomfort.
